title: Multi-Agent Systems Mature
description: Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini working together on shared codebases. Agent coordination becomes practical, not theoretical.

title: GPT-5 Release
description: Significant capability jump across all domains. Pushes frontier of what single-model systems can achieve.

title: Claude Opus 4
description: Extended thinking, agentic capabilities, sustained complex task execution. Powers multi-session autonomous work.

title: Claude Code Launch
description: Anthropic launches agentic coding tool. Autonomous file editing, terminal access, git operations. The agentic era begins.

title: DeepSeek-R1
description: Open-weight reasoning model from China matching o1 performance at a fraction of the cost. Democratises advanced reasoning.

title: o1 Release
description: OpenAI releases o1 with explicit chain-of-thought reasoning. Claims Level 2 (Reasoners) reached. PhD-level science performance.

title: GPT-4o (Omni)
description: Omni model with native audio/video understanding. Sub-second voice responses. Free tier access.

title: Claude 3 Opus
description: Anthropic releases Claude 3 family. Opus leads multiple benchmarks. First model widely considered to match GPT-4.

title: Sora Demonstration
description: OpenAI demonstrates photorealistic text-to-video generation. Later shut down in 2026 due to cost and moderation challenges.

title: Gemini Release
description: Google releases Gemini, natively multimodal from the ground up.

title: Claude 2
description: Anthropic releases Claude 2 with 100K context window — 10x what was standard at the time.

title: GPT-4 Release
description: Multimodal model passing bar exam, SAT, and various professional benchmarks. Significant quality jump over GPT-3.5.

title: ChatGPT Launch
description: OpenAI releases ChatGPT. Broad conversational AI available to the public for the first time. Reaches 100M users in 2 months.
